revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[User:Immanuelle/sandbox]] to [[Template:Akiha Faith]]

revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Kotohira Faith | title = [[Kotohira shrines|Kotohira Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Hiroshige27 kakegawa.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * [[Kagu-tsuchi]] * [[Guanyin]]
|group2 = Locations |list2 =
* [[Akiha-ku, Niigata]] * [[Akihabara]] * [[Akihasan Hongū Akiha Shrine]] * [[Mount Akiha]] |group3 = Branch shrines |list3=
}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:Akiha shrines]] [[Category:Akiha faith]] </noinclude>

* [[Hakodate Hachimangū]]
* [[Ryūtōsan Shrine]]
* [[Sapporo Hachimangū]] {{Navbox | name = Kotohira Faith | title = [[Kotohira shrines|Kotohira Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Hiroshige27 kakegawa.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * [[Ōmononushi]] * [[Konpira Gongen]] * [[Bhaisajyaguru]]
|group2 = Main shrines |list2 = * [[Kotohira-gū]] * [[Matsuo-ji]]
|group3 = Branch shrines |list3=
|group4=misc |list4= * {{ill|Kamiyo Candy|ja|加美代飴}}
}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:Akiha shrines]] [[Category:Akiha faith]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[User:Immanuelle/sandbox]] to [[User:Kotohira Faith]]
Immanuelle moved page [[User:Kotohira Faith]] to [[Template:Kotohira Faith]]
no redlinked categories; only categories that actually exist are permitted
9 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Kotohira_Faith]]
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Trimmed off cruft from entries in [[:Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]

revision.comment: Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Text replacement - "|12=draft" to "|qq=draft"
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q125475314)
Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"
Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23508203007|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24271391609|time triggered pipeline]]
